name: zero
description: Discover and call paid AI capabilities (x402 / MPP) with automatic, wallet-backed payment. Search a live index of external services — image/video/audio generation, web scraping, data enrichment, real-time data, messaging — then call them and pay per use. Bundles the 'zero' skill and the Zero MCP connector.

interface.shortDescription: Search and pay for AI capabilities from any agent.
interface.longDescription: Zero is a search engine and payment layer for AI agents. Discover external paid capabilities (x402 / MPP) — image/video/audio generation, web scraping, data enrichment, real-time data, messaging — call them, and pay per use with a wallet. No per-service signup.
